problem id: 4f89532c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01111011 -> 10111111
  10000111 -> 01100000
  01110101 -> 01011110
  11100011 -> 00101100
  11101110 -> 11111101
  00000110 -> 01100000
  00110101 -> 01010110
  00010111 -> 01110010

query: 11011001
predicted answer: 10001011
